home.subtitle: Experience the ultimate culinary journey in the heart of the city. Ancestral recipes prepared with the finest cuts.
home.promo_title: Coming in a group or having a special event?
home.promo_desc: Moments shared around the fire. We have capacity for over 30 people and exclusive VIP private rooms.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Explore authentic flavors of Seoul.
menu.no_results: No dishes found matching your search.

history.title: Our Story
history.intro_desc: At Bulbit, we honor century-old Korean BBQ recipes, fusing them with a contemporary approach that celebrates the freshest ingredients and innovative techniques.
history.feat1_desc: We carefully select every vegetable from local farms and premium meats, ensuring each bite captures the vibrant essence of Seoul.
history.feat2_desc: Our charcoal grilling technique respects traditional cooking times, achieving that unmistakable smoky flavor and texture that defines us.

contact.title: Find Us in the Heart of the City
contact.subtitle: Experience the pinnacle of Korean BBQ at Bulbit. Whether you're planning a corporate dinner or a family celebration, we're ready to host you.
contact.map_desc: Free valet parking available for all guests.
contact.form_desc: For groups larger than 8, please fill out the form below or call us directly.
contact.plh_msg: Allergies, birthday celebrations, or specific seating preferences...
contact.form_disclaimer: By clicking submit, you agree to our booking policy. A representative will contact you via email within 24 hours to confirm availability.

galbi.name: Galbi (Short Ribs)
galbi.desc: Premium beef short ribs marinated in our secret soy, Korean pear, and garlic recipe. An unmistakable classic.

bulgogi.name: Traditional Bulgogi
bulgogi.desc: Thinly sliced ribeye marinated to perfection. The classic Korean flavor that perfectly combines sweet and savory.

samgyeopsal.name: Samgyeopsal
samgyeopsal.desc: Thick-cut pork belly served with sesame salt and fermented soybean paste. An authentic bite.

dwaeji.name: Dwaeji Bulgogi
dwaeji.desc: Pork marinated in spicy Gochujang sauce. Only for lovers of intense and spicy flavors.

kimchi_duo.name: Kimchi Duo
kimchi_duo.desc: Our homemade combination of fermented napa cabbage kimchi and radish kimchi with sesame and scallions.

purple_rice.name: Purple Rice
purple_rice.desc: Nutritious and aromatic purple rice. A traditional Korean blend of grains and black rice, steamed to perfection.

banchan.name: Banchan Platter
banchan.desc: Six rotating seasonal side dishes ideal for sharing and complementing your barbecue.

bibimbap.name: Dolsot Bibimbap
bibimbap.desc: Sizzling hot stone bowl rice with sautéed vegetables, beef, and a golden fried egg.

kimchi_jjigae.name: Kimchi Jjigae
kimchi_jjigae.desc: Spicy aged kimchi stew with pork belly, tofu, and scallions in a rich, deep broth.

haemul_pajeon.name: Haemul Pajeon
haemul_pajeon.desc: Savory Korean pancake with scallions and assorted seafood, served with our special soy-vinegar dipping sauce.

japchae.name: Japchae
japchae.desc: Stir-fried glass noodles with seasonal vegetables, mushrooms, and aromatic sesame oil.

premium_bulgogi.name: Premium Bulgogi
premium_bulgogi.desc: Premium thinly sliced ribeye marinated in our secret sweet and savory blend for 48 hours.
